title: Templates
excerpt: description: GitHub repositories that are designed to be a starting point for building a new Cloudflare Workers project. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Templates are GitHub repositories that are designed to be a starting point for building a new Cloudflare Workers project. To start any of the projects below, run: [![Deploy to Cloudflare](https://deploy.workers.cloudflare.com/button)](https://deploy.workers.cloudflare.com/?url=https://github.com/cloudflare/templates/tree/main/astro-blog-starter-template)
